# AlgoSec Diagnostic Framework

ADF is the framework. A playbook is one focused troubleshooting path inside the framework.

This site is being rebuilt from scratch around support-first navigation and cleaner diagnostic flows.

## Current focus

Right now we are rebuilding one playbook deliberately instead of carrying forward the older layout.

### Appliance UI is down

Start here when a customer says the UI is down and the engineer is already on SSH.

The current flow is:

1. Apache edge
2. Host health
3. UI services
4. Logs

More playbooks will come back into view after they are rebuilt cleanly.
